title: Technoblade pigs
description: Adds Technoblade’s signature crown to all new pig variants, giving them the royal treatment they deserve.
body:
# 🏆 Technoblade’s Crowns – Pig Variant Pack 🏆  

Honor the legend! This resource pack adds **Technoblade’s signature crown** to all the new pig variants in Minecraft, giving them the royal treatment they deserve.They’ll all be rocking the **King’s golden crown**.  

## 👑 Features:  
- ✔️ Crowns on every new pig variant  
- ✔️ Faithful to the classic Technoblade crown design  
- ✔️ Works seamlessly with vanilla textures  

🐷 **Technoblade never dies!** 🐷  

**Download now and let the pig kingdom reign supreme!** 🏰✨
